description: Visual identification rules for tattoo needles and cartridges — what details can be detected from product photography. Bridges needle.json knowledge base with vision pipeline detection capabilities.

needle_type_visual_cues.description: How to distinguish needle types (RL/RS/M1/CM/F) from visual inspection of the tip

RL.name: Round Liner
visual_cues: needle tips arranged in a tight circle when viewed head-on
tips converge to a single point (like a pencil tip)
crisp circular arrangement with no gap between needles
very tight pinch — needles almost touching each other

distinguish_from.RS: RL = no gap between needles (tight circle). RS = small visible gap between needles (loose circle).
distinguish_from.M1: RL = single circular dot. M1 = two parallel rows (flat/oval shape).

RS.name: Round Shader
visual_cues: needle tips arranged in a circle but with small gaps between them
circle diameter larger than RL of same count
loose pinch — needles spread slightly apart

distinguish_from.RL: RS has visible gaps between needles (loose), RL has no gaps (tight). RS deposits more ink.
distinguish_from.CM: RS = round arrangement. CM = curved arc (not full circle).

M1_MAG.name: Magnum / M1
visual_cues: needle tips visible as two parallel rows (flat configuration)
oval or rectangular tip shape when viewed head-on
broader and flatter than RL/RS round tips
needles arranged in staggered or straight rows

distinguish_from.CM: M1 = straight flat rows. CM = curved/arched rows.
distinguish_from.F: M1 = two rows (double). F = single row (flat).

subtypes.magnum_stacked: stacked (tight packed) magnum, needles very close
subtypes.magnum_weaved: weaved magnum, needles at slight angle

CM.name: Curved Magnum
visual_cues: needle tips arranged in a curved/arched pattern
rows curve gently (not straight like M1)
arc shape visible when viewed from the side
less skin trauma than flat M1

distinguish_from.M1: CM = curved rows. M1 = straight rows. CM = smoother shading, less skin trauma.
distinguish_from.RS: CM = two curved rows (larger area). RS = single circle (smaller area).

F.name: Flat
visual_cues: needle tips arranged in a single straight line
flat narrow tip profile (thin line vs round)
single row only (not double like M1)

distinguish_from.M1: F = single row. M1 = two rows (double).
distinguish_from.RL: F = straight line profile. RL = round profile.

Bugpin.name: Bugpin
visual_cues: needles visibly thinner than standard (comparison context needed)
finer gauge than surrounding reference objects
often used in CM configuration (bugpin curved magnum)
Bugpin.detection_note: Bugpin is defined by wire diameter (<0.30mm), not by arrangement. Any type (RL/RS/CM/M1) can be bugpin if gauge is small enough.

brand_visual_signature.description: Brand-specific visual fingerprints for identifying needle/cartridge manufacturers from product photos

kwadron.name: Kwadron
kwadron.labelStyle: metallic ring around cartridge body with embossed logo
kwadron.packagingStyle: individual blister in branded display box

productLines.hybrid_system: standard line, black body + gold ring
productLines.hybrid_bugpin: same visual but labeled for bugpin gauge

certaintyCues: if not black+gold, check label ring for embossed K logo

cheyenne.name: Cheyenne
cheyenne.labelStyle: laser-etched or printed on translucent body
cheyenne.packagingStyle: individual sterile blister, color-coded by line
distinctiveFeatures: visible silicone membrane (white) on Safety series

productLines.safety: translucent blue — most common, ISO 13485, visible white silicone membrane
productLines.craft: translucent pink — budget line, fewer configurations

certaintyCues: translucent blue = high confidence Safety series

bigwasp.name: BigWasp
bigwasp.labelStyle: printed label on clear body or packaging
bigwasp.packagingStyle: Gen 3 branding on box, color-coded label bands
certaintyCues: clear body + affordable pricing context = BigWasp

blackclaw.name: BlackClaw
distinctiveFeatures: metal body is signature (unique among cartridge brands)

tatsoul.name: TATSoul
distinctiveFeatures: clear body + vibrant colored label ring

cnc.name: CNC Tattoo
distinctiveFeatures: solid black body (not transparent like most brands)
certaintyCues: solid black housing (check not Kwadron — no gold ring)

fkirons.name: FK Irons
fkirons.note: Mainly a machine brand; does not make own cartridges at scale
fkirons.cartridgeSource: rebrands Cheyenne Craft cartridges or Elite Three 5 Magnum (USA-made)
certaintyCues: white cartridge + FK Irons machine in frame = FK Irons cartridge

bishop_rotary.name: Bishop Rotary
bishop_rotary.cartridgeSource: recommends Cheyenne or other compatible cartridges

stigma.name: Stigma
certaintyCues: clear body, no distinctive brand marks = check packaging for Stigma logo

gauge_visual_estimation.description: Rules for estimating needle gauge from visual cues (without magnification). Gauge is difficult to determine precisely from standard product photos and is best inferred from context.
gauge_visual_estimation.difficulty: hard — requires macro shot or label legibility

methods.name: label_direct
methods.condition: label text legible (e.g. 1003RL on cartridge body or packaging)
methods.method: read gauge digits from printed label

methods.name: relative_comparison
methods.condition: multiple cartridges visible together for size comparison
methods.method: compare needle thickness relative to known reference (coin, hand, ruler in frame)

methods.name: use_case_inference
methods.condition: no direct gauge visibility, but usage context available
methods.method: infer gauge from needle type and intended use (e.g. 3RL for fine line = likely #10 or #8; 14M1 for packing = likely #12)

productDetail_granularity.description: Structured breakdown of what productDetail fields can be detected from product photography, at what confidence level

needle_type.method: tip shape visible in macro/close-up — distinguish RL/RS/M1/CM/F by arrangement

needle_count.method: count needle tips visible at cartridge opening — easier for RL (few needles), harder for M1 (many needles)

needle_gauge.method: requires label legibility or macro with reference object

taper.method: requires side profile of needle tip to see taper length — rarely visible in standard product shots

cartridge_membrane.method: visible at cartridge base — need side/angled view
cartridge_membrane.confidence_when_visible: 70% from base view, <20% from top view

cartridge_connection.method: visible at cartridge base in side profile — screw thread vs smooth (bayonet) vs magnetic

brand_identification.method: best cue = housing color + label style combination
brand_identification.confidence_when_visible: 80% with color+label, 60% with color only, <30% from shape alone

color_brand_map.solid_black: CNC / maybe Kwadron (low — need label check)

from_label_text.format: parse gauge+count+type+taper from printed text on cartridge or packaging
from_label_text.pattern: XXYYZZ or XXYYZZ_Taper, e.g. '1003RL LT' or '1207M1'

from_visual_tip.format: infer type+count from tip shape, type from arrangement
from_visual_tip.fallback: estimate type only (RL/RS/M1/CM/F), leave gauge and taper unknown

from_brand_context.format: if brand is identified from housing color but no detail level visible, output brand + most common format for that brand

needle_detection_pipeline.description: Decision flow for needle/cartridge detail extraction from product photos

steps.condition: image is a product photo, not a tattoo
needle tip or cartridge body visible in frame

steps.notes: Zoom into cartridge body or packaging text. If legible gauge+type format found, use as primary source.

steps.action: If no legible label, identify housing color + label style for brand inference
steps.notes: Use color_brand_map to narrow brand candidates

steps.action: Examine needle tip (if visible in macro/close-up)
steps.notes: Classify arrangement: circle tight (RL) / circle loose (RS) / double row flat (M1) / double row curved (CM) / single row (F)
Count tips at opening. For M1/CM >14, count is approximate.

steps.action: Check cartridge base for membrane type + connection type (if side/angled view)
steps.notes: White opaque = standard, clear = Kwadron, translucent white = Cheyenne Safety

steps.action: Check packaging format for additional clues
steps.notes: Individual blister vs tray vs box can hint at brand position (blister = premium, tray = bulk)

flow_channel_visual_cues.description: 流道 visual identification — inner diameter clearance and internal taper angle that determine ink flow characteristics
flow_channel_visual_cues.detectability: medium — requires transparent or semi-transparent cartridge housing to observe

restrictions.opaque_housing: metal (BlackClaw), solid black (CNC/Kwadron) — cannot observe flow channel directly; set flowChannelVisible='no_opaque_housing'
restrictions.transparent_housing: clear (BigWasp/TATSoul), translucent (Cheyenne), frosted (MagicMoon) — flow channel potentially visible

inner_diameter_clearance.description: 针束与壳壁之间的间隙 — determines ink flow speed and volume

visual_cues: needle bundle visibly loose inside housing tube
noticeable space between needle tips and inner wall
ink flows freely around needles without resistance
wide_gap.flow_characteristic: high flow rate — suited for M1/CM large area color packing
wide_gap.drawback: potential ink splatter (飞墨) at high machine speed

visual_cues: needle bundle snug inside housing tube
minimal visible space around needle bundle
ink channel appears narrow and precise
tight_gap.flow_characteristic: precise controlled flow — suited for RL fine lining, zero splatter
tight_gap.drawback: potential ink starvation (供墨不足) at high speed

visual_cues: balanced clearance between needle and wall
some space visible but not excessive
even ink distribution around needles
moderate_gap.flow_characteristic: balanced flow — versatile for most techniques

inner_diameter_clearance.detection_method: observe needle bundle inside housing through transparent/translucent wall and compare gap width relative to needle diameter

internal_taper_angle.description: 内锥角度 — internal convergence angle at housing tip, determines ink concentration at needle exit

visual_cues: housing tip tapers sharply inward
short convergence zone at tip (funnel-like)
narrow opening at needle exit point
steep_angle.flow_characteristic: ink concentrates at needle tip — precise deposition, good for RL/RS fine control

visual_cues: gentle gradual taper at housing tip
long convergence zone maintaining width
wide opening persists most of tip length
shallow_angle.flow_characteristic: ink disperses wider — good for M1/CM large area fill and smooth shading

visual_cues: visible step or inflection in taper profile
two distinct angle zones (steep→shallow or reverse)
complex internal geometry — not a simple cone
multi_stage.flow_characteristic: front-end concentration + rear-end acceleration — hybrid compound design, premium feature

internal_taper_angle.detection_method: examine side profile of housing tip and observe internal taper shape through transparent housing; metal housings block observation entirely

membrane_flow_relationship.description: 膜类型与流道表现的关联 — membrane stiffness affects flow resistance at cartridge base
membrane_flow_relationship.white_standard: moderate flow resistance, universal compatibility — most common
membrane_flow_relationship.clear_thin: low resistance, faster ink delivery — Kwadron's design for high-speed lining without drag
membrane_flow_relationship.silicone_high_perf: higher resistance, more controlled delivery — Cheyenne Safety design for precision work
membrane_flow_relationship.flow_implication: softer/thinner membrane = less dampening (faster flow but more splatter risk); stiffer/thicker membrane = more controlled flow (less splatter but may starve at speed)

output_fields.description: Fields output by Hook Vision AI for flow channel detection

flowChannelVisible.condition: transparent/translucent housing must be present for 'yes_*' values

internalTaperVisible.condition: side profile of tip needed, plus transparent housing
